---
title: "PR, Heritability, AUPRC Gain, and Effect Quality Figure (5-arm)"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

Streamlined cached plotting workbook for a 5-arm paper figure with:

1. pooled top-8 precision-recall curves,
2. model-level heritability estimates by method,
3. mu-chain vs pi-chain AUPRC gains,
4. pooled per-effect quality density shifts.

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
here::i_am("vignettes/one_off_validations/effect_matching_pr_pve_quality_figure_5arm.Rmd")

library(here)
library(devtools)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)

source(here("vignettes", "one_off_validations", "_5arm_cfg.R"))
```

# Inputs

```{r paths}
output_root <- here("output")
study_name <- "baseline_sims_5arm_effect_matching"
study_dir <- file.path(output_root, "effect_matching_study", study_name)
plot_dir <- file.path(study_dir, "drift_analysis_plots")
dir.create(plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

records_rds <- file.path(study_dir, "effect_refit_records.rds")
auprc_per_dataset_csv <- file.path(study_dir, "auprc_per_dataset_5arm.csv")
pr_curves_pooled_csv <- file.path(study_dir, "pr_curves_pooled_top8_5arm.csv")
pr_auc_pooled_csv <- file.path(study_dir, "pr_auc_pooled_top8_5arm.csv")
effect_quality_pair_rows_csv <- file.path(study_dir, "effect_quality_pair_rows_5arm.csv")
effect_quality_density_shift_csv <- file.path(study_dir, "effect_quality_density_shift_5arm.csv")
dataset_y_var_csv <- file.path(study_dir, "dataset_y_variance_5arm.csv")

baseline_screening_summary_csv <- file.path(
  output_root, "slurm_output", baseline_job_name_5arm,
  baseline_parent_job_id_5arm, "consolidated", "screening_summary.csv"
)
baseline_cfg_path <- file.path(
  output_root, "run_history", baseline_job_name_5arm,
  baseline_parent_job_id_5arm, "job_config.json"
)

paper_figure_pr_pve_quality_png <- file.path(
  plot_dir, "paper_figure_pr_pve_effect_quality.png"
)

required_cache_files <- c(
  records_rds,
  auprc_per_dataset_csv,
  pr_curves_pooled_csv,
  effect_quality_pair_rows_csv
)
missing_cache_files <- required_cache_files[!file.exists(required_cache_files)]
if (length(missing_cache_files)) {
  stop(
    "Missing required cached plotting inputs. Run the 5-arm refit export and ",
    "effect_matching_drift_analysis_5arm.Rmd once to generate them:\n",
    paste(missing_cache_files, collapse = "\n")
  )
}

cat("Study dir:", study_dir, "\n")
cat("Plot dir:", plot_dir, "\n")
```

# Plot Options

```{r options}
baseline_method <- "susie_vanilla"
mu_method <- "susine_functional_mu"
pi_method <- "susie_functional_pi"
warm_mu_method <- "susie_vanilla_warm_from_mu"
warm_pi_method <- "susie_vanilla_warm_from_pi"

method_labels <- c(
  susie_vanilla = "SuSiE-vanilla (cold)",
  susine_functional_mu = "SuSiNE-functional-mu (cold)",
  susie_vanilla_warm_from_mu = "SuSiE-vanilla (warm from mu)",
  susie_functional_pi = "SuSiE-functional-pi (cold)",
  susie_vanilla_warm_from_pi = "SuSiE-vanilla (warm from pi)"
)
method_legend_short <- c(
  susie_vanilla = "Vanilla cold",
  susine_functional_mu = "Functional-mu",
  susie_vanilla_warm_from_mu = "Warm vanilla (mu)",
  susie_functional_pi = "Functional-pi",
  susie_vanilla_warm_from_pi = "Warm vanilla (pi)"
)
method_color <- c(
  susie_vanilla = "black",
  susine_functional_mu = "#2b8cbe",
  susie_vanilla_warm_from_mu = "#9ecae1",
  susie_functional_pi = "#74c476",
  susie_vanilla_warm_from_pi = "#bae4b3"
)
methods_in_order <- c(
  baseline_method, mu_method, warm_mu_method, pi_method, warm_pi_method
)

pr_top_k <- 8L

x_keff_breaks <- c(1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200, 500, 1000)
x_limits <- NULL
y_limits <- c(0, 1)
density_grid_n <- 140L
density_bandwidth <- c(0.45, 0.10)
density_trim_quantile <- c(0.005, 0.995)
density_fill_quantile <- 0.95
```

# Helpers

```{r helpers}
`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

resolve_limits <- function(values, user_limits, trim = density_trim_quantile) {
  if (!is.null(user_limits)) {
    return(user_limits)
  }
  values <- values[is.finite(values)]
  if (!length(values)) {
    stop("Cannot infer limits from an empty/non-finite vector.")
  }
  stats::quantile(values, probs = trim, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE)
}

keff_x_scale <- function(breaks = x_keff_breaks, xlim = NULL) {
  finite_breaks <- breaks[breaks > 0]
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = log(finite_breaks),
    labels = formatC(finite_breaks, format = "fg", big.mark = ","),
    limits = xlim
  )
}

theme_effect_paper <- function(base_size = 8) {
  theme_bw(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey91", linewidth = 0.22),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "grey35", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.35),
      axis.title = element_text(size = base_size),
      axis.text = element_text(size = base_size - 1, color = "grey25"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 1.2,
                                margin = margin(b = 3)),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey88", color = "grey35",
                                      linewidth = 0.35),
      strip.text = element_text(size = base_size - 0.8, color = "grey20"),
      legend.title = element_text(size = base_size - 0.4),
      legend.text = element_text(size = base_size - 1.1),
      legend.key.height = grid::unit(3.2, "mm"),
      legend.key.width = grid::unit(6.0, "mm"),
      plot.margin = margin(2.5, 2.5, 2.5, 2.5)
    )
}

weighted_kde2d_df <- function(df, xlim, ylim, n, h) {
  group_values <- c("source", "destination")
  dens <- lapply(group_values, function(g) {
    sub <- df %>%
      dplyr::filter(.data$arm_role == g) %>%
      dplyr::filter(
        is.finite(.data$x_value),
        is.finite(.data$y_value),
        .data$x_value >= xlim[[1]],
        .data$x_value <= xlim[[2]],
        .data$y_value >= ylim[[1]],
        .data$y_value <= ylim[[2]]
      )
    if (nrow(sub) < 3L) return(NULL)
    w <- pmax(tidyr::replace_na(sub$pve_weight, 0), 0)
    if (sum(w) <= 0) {
      w <- rep(1 / nrow(sub), nrow(sub))
    } else {
      w <- w / sum(w)
    }
    x_grid <- seq(xlim[[1]], xlim[[2]], length.out = n)
    y_grid <- seq(ylim[[1]], ylim[[2]], length.out = n)
    kx <- outer(x_grid, sub$x_value, function(grid, obs) {
      stats::dnorm((grid - obs) / h[[1]]) / h[[1]]
    })
    ky <- outer(y_grid, sub$y_value, function(grid, obs) {
      stats::dnorm((grid - obs) / h[[2]]) / h[[2]]
    })
    ky <- sweep(ky, 2L, w, `*`)
    z <- kx %*% t(ky)
    list(group = g, x = x_grid, y = y_grid, z = z,
         n_rows = nrow(sub), pve_mass = sum(sub$pve_weight, na.rm = TRUE))
  })
  names(dens) <- group_values
  if (is.null(dens$source) || is.null(dens$destination)) {
    return(tibble::tibble())
  }
  tidyr::expand_grid(x = dens$source$x, y = dens$source$y) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      density_source = as.vector(t(dens$source$z)),
      density_destination = as.vector(t(dens$destination$z)),
      density_diff = .data$density_destination - .data$density_source,
      n_source = dens$source$n_rows,
      n_destination = dens$destination$n_rows,
      pve_source = dens$source$pve_mass,
      pve_destination = dens$destination$pve_mass
    )
}

build_density_shift_from_pair_rows <- function(pair_rows) {
  x_limits_resolved <- resolve_limits(pair_rows$x_value, x_limits)
  y_limits_resolved <- resolve_limits(pair_rows$y_value, y_limits)
  density_shift_rows <- list()
  for (ch in levels(pair_rows$chain)) {
    for (cmp in levels(pair_rows$comparison_kind)) {
      sub <- pair_rows %>%
        dplyr::filter(.data$chain == ch, .data$comparison_kind == cmp)
      dens <- weighted_kde2d_df(
        sub,
        xlim = x_limits_resolved,
        ylim = y_limits_resolved,
        n = density_grid_n,
        h = density_bandwidth
      )
      if (!nrow(dens)) next
      density_shift_rows[[length(density_shift_rows) + 1L]] <- dens %>%
        dplyr::mutate(chain = ch, comparison_kind = cmp)
    }
  }
  dplyr::bind_rows(density_shift_rows)
}
```

# Read Cached Data

```{r read-cache}
records <- readRDS(records_rds) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    dataset_bundle_id = as.character(.data$dataset_bundle_id),
    model_method = factor(.data$model_method, levels = methods_in_order)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$model_method))

if (file.exists(dataset_y_var_csv)) {
  dataset_y_var <- readr::read_csv(dataset_y_var_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(dataset_bundle_id = as.character(.data$dataset_bundle_id))
} else {
  suppressMessages(devtools::load_all(here()))
  cfg_bundle <- build_5arm_cfg(
    here_root = here(),
    output_root = output_root,
    baseline_screening_csv = baseline_screening_summary_csv,
    baseline_cfg_path = baseline_cfg_path,
    settings_cache_csv = file.path(study_dir, "selected_5arm_settings.csv"),
    prefer_settings_cache = TRUE
  )
  cfg_for_hg2 <- cfg_bundle$cfg
  bundle_rows_all <- cfg_for_hg2$tables$dataset_bundles %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(dataset_bundle_id = as.character(.data$dataset_bundle_id))
  ds_ids_for_hg2 <- sort(unique(records$dataset_bundle_id))
  dataset_y_var <- lapply(ds_ids_for_hg2, function(ds_id) {
    bundle_row <- bundle_rows_all %>%
      dplyr::filter(.data$dataset_bundle_id == !!ds_id)
    if (nrow(bundle_row) != 1L) {
      stop("Expected one bundle row for ", ds_id, "; got ", nrow(bundle_row))
    }
    data_bundle <- test_susine:::generate_data_for_bundle(
      bundle_row, cfg_for_hg2
    )
    tibble::tibble(
      dataset_bundle_id = ds_id,
      y_var = stats::var(as.numeric(data_bundle$y))
    )
  }) %>%
    dplyr::bind_rows()
  readr::write_csv(dataset_y_var, dataset_y_var_csv)
}

auprc_per_dataset <- readr::read_csv(
  auprc_per_dataset_csv, show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(dataset_bundle_id = as.character(.data$dataset_bundle_id))

pr_curve_df <- readr::read_csv(pr_curves_pooled_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    model_method = factor(.data$model_method, levels = methods_in_order)
  )

if (file.exists(pr_auc_pooled_csv)) {
  pr_auc_df <- readr::read_csv(pr_auc_pooled_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      model_method = factor(.data$model_method, levels = methods_in_order)
    )
  prevalence <- unique(pr_auc_df$prevalence)
  if (!length(prevalence) || !is.finite(prevalence[[1]])) {
    prevalence <- 0.008
  } else {
    prevalence <- prevalence[[1]]
  }
} else {
  message("PR-AUC cache missing; estimating AUPRC labels from cached PR curves.")
  pr_auc_df <- pr_curve_df %>%
    dplyr::arrange(.data$model_method, .data$recall) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data$model_method) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      auprc_integral = sum(
        diff(.data$recall) *
          0.5 * (dplyr::lag(.data$precision)[-1] + .data$precision[-1]),
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      model_method = factor(.data$model_method, levels = methods_in_order)
    )
  prevalence <- 0.008
}

if (file.exists(effect_quality_density_shift_csv)) {
  density_shift_df <- readr::read_csv(
    effect_quality_density_shift_csv, show_col_types = FALSE
  )
} else {
  message("Density-shift cache missing; rebuilding once from effect-quality pair rows.")
  effect_quality_pair_rows <- readr::read_csv(
    effect_quality_pair_rows_csv, show_col_types = FALSE
  ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      chain = factor(.data$chain, levels = c("mu", "pi")),
      arm_role = factor(.data$arm_role, levels = c("source", "destination")),
      comparison_kind = factor(
        .data$comparison_kind,
        levels = c("vanilla_to_treatment",
                   "treatment_to_warm",
                   "vanilla_to_warm")
      )
    )
  density_shift_df <- build_density_shift_from_pair_rows(effect_quality_pair_rows)
  readr::write_csv(density_shift_df, effect_quality_density_shift_csv)
}

density_shift_df <- density_shift_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    chain = factor(.data$chain, levels = c("mu", "pi")),
    comparison_kind = factor(
      .data$comparison_kind,
      levels = c("vanilla_to_treatment",
                 "treatment_to_warm",
                 "vanilla_to_warm")
    )
  )

x_limits_resolved <- range(density_shift_df$x, na.rm = TRUE)
y_limits_resolved <- range(density_shift_df$y, na.rm = TRUE)
shared_abs_diff <- abs(density_shift_df$density_diff)
shared_abs_diff <- shared_abs_diff[is.finite(shared_abs_diff)]
shared_fill_lim <- stats::quantile(
  shared_abs_diff, probs = density_fill_quantile, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE
)
if (!is.finite(shared_fill_lim) || shared_fill_lim <= 0) {
  shared_fill_lim <- max(shared_abs_diff, na.rm = TRUE)
}
```

# Figure

```{r figure, fig.width=8.8, fig.height=6.9}
chain_labeller <- c(mu = "mu chain", pi = "pi chain")
pair_kind_labeller <- c(
  "cold -> annotated" = "Cold -> annotated",
  "cold -> vanilla_warm" = "Cold -> warm vanilla"
)

method_legend_labels <- vapply(
  levels(pr_curve_df$model_method),
  function(m) {
    auprc_val <- pr_auc_df$auprc_integral[
      match(m, as.character(pr_auc_df$model_method))
    ]
    sprintf("%s (%.3f)",
            method_legend_short[[m]] %||% method_labels[[m]] %||% m,
            auprc_val)
  },
  character(1)
)

panel_A <- ggplot(pr_curve_df,
                  aes(x = .data$recall, y = .data$precision,
                      color = .data$model_method)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = prevalence, color = "grey60",
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_step(direction = "vh", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = method_color[levels(pr_curve_df$model_method)],
    labels = method_legend_labels
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(
    x = "Recall", y = "Precision",
    color = "Method (pooled AUPRC)",
    title = paste0("A. Precision-recall on top-", pr_top_k,
                   " causal SNPs (600 datasets)")
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(
    nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE, title.position = "top",
    override.aes = list(linewidth = 0.7)
  )) +
  theme_effect_paper(base_size = 8) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "left",
    legend.box.margin = margin(t = -4),
    legend.key.height = grid::unit(3.0, "mm"),
    legend.key.width = grid::unit(6, "mm"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 6.8),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 6.2),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "grey95", linewidth = 0.18)
  )

hg2_df <- records %>%
  dplyr::group_by(.data$dataset_bundle_id, .data$model_method) %>%
  dplyr::group_modify(function(df, key) {
    fy_list <- df$fitted_y_effect
    finite_fy <- vapply(
      fy_list,
      function(fy) length(fy) > 1L && all(is.finite(fy)),
      logical(1)
    )
    y_var <- dataset_y_var$y_var[
      match(as.character(key$dataset_bundle_id[[1]]), dataset_y_var$dataset_bundle_id)
    ]
    if (!is.finite(y_var) || y_var <= 0 || !any(finite_fy)) {
      return(tibble::tibble(hg2_hat = NA_real_, y_var = y_var))
    }
    fitted_total <- Reduce(`+`, lapply(fy_list[finite_fy], as.numeric))
    tibble::tibble(
      hg2_hat = max(0, min(1, stats::var(fitted_total) / y_var)),
      y_var = y_var
    )
  }) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

panel_B <- ggplot(hg2_df,
                  aes(x = .data$model_method, y = .data$hg2_hat,
                      fill = .data$model_method)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.25, linetype = "dotted",
             linewidth = 0.45, color = "grey25") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.68, outlier.alpha = 0.18,
               outlier.size = 0.45, linewidth = 0.28) +
  annotate(
    "text", x = warm_pi_method, y = 0.25,
    label = "true h_g^2 = 0.25",
    hjust = 1.03, vjust = 1.45, size = 2.35, color = "grey20"
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = method_legend_short[methods_in_order], drop = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = method_color, guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.01)) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = expression(hat(h)[g]^2),
    title = "B. Estimated model heritability"
  ) +
  theme_effect_paper(base_size = 8) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1, vjust = 1,
                               size = 6.5),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9.2,
                              margin = margin(b = 3))
  )

panel_C_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  auprc_per_dataset %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      .data$dataset_bundle_id,
      transition = "cold -> annotated",
      delta_mu = .data$auprc_delta_mu,
      delta_pi = .data$auprc_delta_pi
    ),
  auprc_per_dataset %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      .data$dataset_bundle_id,
      transition = "cold -> warm",
      delta_mu = .data$auprc_delta_warm_mu_vs_vanilla,
      delta_pi = .data$auprc_delta_warm_pi_vs_vanilla
    )
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    transition = factor(.data$transition,
                        levels = c("cold -> annotated", "cold -> warm"))
  )

delta_lim <- max(abs(c(panel_C_df$delta_mu, panel_C_df$delta_pi)),
                 na.rm = TRUE)
delta_lim <- max(delta_lim, 0.01, na.rm = TRUE)

panel_C_count_df <- panel_C_df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(.data$transition) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    above = sum(.data$delta_mu > .data$delta_pi, na.rm = TRUE),
    below = sum(.data$delta_mu < .data$delta_pi, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
panel_C_above_labels <- panel_C_count_df %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    .data$transition,
    x = -0.94 * delta_lim,
    y = 0.94 * delta_lim,
    label = paste0("above diagonal: n = ", .data$above)
  )
panel_C_below_labels <- panel_C_count_df %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    .data$transition,
    x = 0.94 * delta_lim,
    y = -0.94 * delta_lim,
    label = paste0("below diagonal: n = ", .data$below)
  )

panel_C <- ggplot(panel_C_df,
                  aes(x = .data$delta_pi, y = .data$delta_mu)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.25, color = "grey70") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.25, color = "grey70") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
              color = "grey35", linewidth = 0.35) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.38, size = 0.85, color = "grey20") +
  geom_text(
    data = panel_C_above_labels,
    aes(x = .data$x, y = .data$y, label = .data$label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, hjust = 0, vjust = 1,
    size = 2.45, color = "grey20"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = panel_C_below_labels,
    aes(x = .data$x, y = .data$y, label = .data$label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, hjust = 1, vjust = 0,
    size = 2.45, color = "grey20"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ transition, nrow = 1) +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(-delta_lim, delta_lim),
              ylim = c(-delta_lim, delta_lim)) +
  labs(
    x = expression(paste(Delta, "AUPRC, ", pi, " chain")),
    y = expression(paste(Delta, "AUPRC, ", mu, " chain")),
    title = "C. AUPRC gains: mu vs pi chains"
  ) +
  theme_effect_paper(base_size = 8) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9.2,
                              margin = margin(b = 3))
  )

panel_D_df <- density_shift_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(.data$comparison_kind %in% c(
    "vanilla_to_treatment", "vanilla_to_warm"
  )) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    comparison_kind = factor(
      .data$comparison_kind,
      levels = c("vanilla_to_treatment", "vanilla_to_warm"),
      labels = c("cold -> annotated", "cold -> vanilla_warm")
    ),
    chain = factor(.data$chain, levels = c("mu", "pi"))
  )

x_label_paper <- expression(paste(
  "Effect diffuseness: effective top-95% support size  ", K[l]
))
y_label_paper <- expression(paste(
  "Effect accuracy: ", A[l], " = max causal PIP / max SNP PIP"
))

panel_D_core <- ggplot(panel_D_df,
                       aes(x = .data$x, y = .data$y,
                           fill = .data$density_diff)) +
  geom_raster(interpolate = TRUE) +
  geom_contour(aes(z = .data$density_diff),
               color = "grey20", alpha = 0.45, linewidth = 0.18) +
  facet_grid(
    chain ~ comparison_kind,
    labeller = labeller(chain = chain_labeller,
                        comparison_kind = pair_kind_labeller)
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2b6cb0", mid = "white", high = "#c53030",
    midpoint = 0, limits = c(-shared_fill_lim, shared_fill_lim),
    oob = scales::squish
  ) +
  keff_x_scale(xlim = x_limits_resolved) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = x_limits_resolved,
                  ylim = y_limits_resolved,
                  expand = FALSE) +
  labs(
    x = x_label_paper, y = y_label_paper,
    fill = "destination - source\n(PVE-weighted density)",
    title = "D. Per-effect quality shifts"
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(
    title.position = "top",
    title.hjust = 0.5,
    barwidth = grid::unit(0.34, "cm"),
    barheight = grid::unit(2.4, "cm"),
    direction = "vertical"
  )) +
  theme_effect_paper(base_size = 8) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 2),
    legend.box.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 2),
    panel.spacing.y = grid::unit(1.25, "mm"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9.2,
                              margin = margin(b = 3))
  )

panel_D <- (panel_D_core + guide_area()) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 0.13), guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "right")

top_row <- (wrap_elements(full = panel_A) | wrap_elements(full = panel_B)) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(0.52, 0.48))

combined_fig <- (top_row / panel_C / panel_D) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(0.9, 0.8, 1.25))

ggsave(
  paper_figure_pr_pve_quality_png, combined_fig,
  width = 8.8, height = 8.8, dpi = 300, bg = "white",
  limitsize = FALSE
)
cat("Wrote figure to ", paper_figure_pr_pve_quality_png, "\n", sep = "")
print(combined_fig)
```
